basic-operations.label: Basic Operations
basic-operations.summary: Learn how to perform basic operations with Python.

help.concept: Addition combines two numbers into a larger number.
help.hint_2: Consider the total when you add 5 and 3.

q2.title: Complete the operation
q2.hint: Think about what number you need to subtract from 10 to get 4.

help.concept: Subtraction finds the difference between two numbers.
help.hint_1: What number do you need to subtract from 10?

1.title: Introduction to Basic Operations
1.bodyMarkdown: In this section, we will explore how to perform basic arithmetic operations using Python. These operations include addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
